customAttributes.description:
Avatar: The Last Airbender: Everything Changed

You may put a green creature card from your hand onto the battlefield.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair x Avatar: The Last Airbender: Everything Changed and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/25/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: “Your final test is a duel. And as a special treat, you may choose your opponent. Choose wisely!”
